summary: Cluster-First Algorithm Auto-Upgrade Feature - All 9 tests passed. Verified that routes >40 stops auto-upgrade to cluster_first algorithm regardless of user-selected algorithm.

tests.name: POST /api/optimize algorithm=ortools upgrades to cluster_first
tests.detail: 165 stops with ortools correctly upgraded to cluster_first, response includes clusters array

tests.name: POST /api/optimize algorithm=alns upgrades to cluster_first
tests.detail: 165 stops with alns correctly upgraded to cluster_first

tests.name: POST /api/optimize algorithm=cluster_first works directly
tests.detail: No double-wrapping, cluster_first works as expected

tests.name: POST /api/optimize algorithm=auto selects cluster_first
tests.detail: Auto correctly selects cluster_first for >25 stops

tests.name: Cluster info structure validation
tests.detail: Response includes clusters array with id, stop_count, centroid fields for polygon visualization

tests.name: Small route threshold verification
tests.detail: CLUSTER_THRESHOLD=40 is correctly set in server.py

tests.name: GET /api/optimize/algorithms lists cluster_first
tests.detail: cluster_first algorithm is listed with proper description

critical_code_review_comments: CLUSTER_THRESHOLD=40 correctly enforces cluster_first for large routes
inner_algorithm parameter preserves user's preferred algorithm for per-cluster optimization
Response correctly includes 'clusters' array when cluster_first is used
Algorithm field in response correctly shows 'cluster_first' when upgraded
test_credentials: DEV_MODE=True uses dev-user-123, no credentials needed
seed_data_creation: Using existing 165 stops in Caloundra/Meridan Plains QLD area
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cluster-first auto-upgrade feature is working correctly. Routes >40 stops automatically use cluster_first as backbone, with user's chosen algorithm (ortools, alns, etc.) used within each cluster. Response includes 'clusters' array for polygon visualization. Global 2-opt pass fixes cross-boundary inefficiencies.

key_findings.cluster_first_upgrade: Working - ortools/alns/auto all correctly upgrade to cluster_first for 165 stops
key_findings.inner_algorithm: User's preferred algorithm preserved for per-cluster optimization
key_findings.clusters_response: Response includes clusters array with id, stop_count, centroid, fill_color, border_color
key_findings.global_2opt: Global 2-opt pass working - logs show route improvements (e.g., 44.24 km → 29.49 km)

mocked_apis_list: Backend DEV_MODE=True with dev-user-123 mock stops data
